calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 5

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Edward Wing Yee is present.
Attorney Michele L. Giguiere (916-967-6883), counsel for the plaintiff.
Defendants Rolando Figueroa, Victor Mendoza, Jose Lima, Humberto Galvamez and Walter Lemus are present.
Attorney Jessica Bogo of Justice and Diversity Center (415-782-9000), counsel for defendants in limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 502B re settlement discussions. The case is NOT settled. The trial date of JUL-21-2014 remains on calendar. Plaintiff counsel indicates a dismissal may be filed in this action and requests matter go off calendar.
